ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the product sold */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff who processed the transaction */,
  "hotel_guest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel guest making the purchase */,
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment type used */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion applied */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_payment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_type_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_hotel_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code for inventory purposes */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Hand Care, Skincare) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "staff_category" TEXT /* Category of the staff member (e.g., Receptionist, Spa Attendant) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the guest */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guests_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., card, cash) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was logged */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message describing the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the date */,
  "total_units_sold" INTEGER /* Total units sold on the date */,
  "average_sale_value" REAL /* Average sale value for the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being promoted */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guest providing feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the guest */,
  "follow_up_action" TEXT /* Follow-up action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" REAL /* Points awarded per dollar spent */,
  "reward_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for redeeming rewards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guest earning the reward */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the guest */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward (e.g., pending, redeemed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_rewards_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_rewards_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)
